name: Time-stream Breakout (RPG)
description:
(This idea came somewhat randomly, so expect me to update this once in a while)

This setting is basically like a plants vs zombies 2's modern times scenario where time was messed with but without the plants or zombies. In other words, expect all sorts of people from different times like samurai, pirates, cowboys, egyptians, 80's teens, the greeks, the british, machines from a far future, and so on.

P.D: Also if anyone has ideas on what to add or change, then you are welcome to give critism that may be helpful or suggestions for characters that could be added for a better experience.
creator: nuclear_reactor
